servinfo.title: Vehicle pulls to one side (Brakes not working uniformly)

condition.ptxt: Vehicle pulls to one side (Brakes not working uniformly)

ps.ptxt: Pad, disc, shoe and/or drum are wet with water or stained with oil in some brakes
Drum-to-shoe clearance out of adjustment in some brake (Malfunctioning auto adjusting mechanism) (rear drum brake model)

action.ptxt: Check for inoperative auto adjusting mechanism.

ps.ptxt: Disc and/or drum are out of round in some brakes
Malfunction in wheel cylinders (rear drum brake model)

action.ptxt: Tires with approximately the same amount of tread should be used on the same axle.

paragroup.ptxt: Check for soft hoses and damaged lines.
Replace with new hoses and new double-walled steel brake tubing.

action.ptxt: Check for stuck or sluggish pistons and proper lubrication of caliper slide pin.
Check and torque bolts to specifications.
